header.installTitle: Install the app on your device

whfb6Linking.label: Link to 6th.whfb.app
whfb6Linking.hint: When linking is off, rule, weapon and magic-item chips show the catalog quick info instead of a link to the external site.

language.label: Language
language.hint: Controls the language of the user interface. Game content stays in its original language.

dashboard.title: War Camp
dashboard.subtitle: Marshal your army lists or forge new campaigns.

offlineBanner.title: Offline mode active
offlineBanner.text: You have no connection to the aether. Even so, you may manage and edit your army lists and catalogs without hindrance.

empty.title: The Armories Lie Empty
empty.text: No banners yet fly over your war camp. Gather your troops, choose your leaders, and ready yourself for the battles to come.

missingLibraryDependency.headline: Import aborted: a selected catalog references a library catalog that was not selected.
missingLibraryDependency.instruction: Please also select the following catalogs to ensure a complete import:

importer.indexUnreachable: The catalog index is currently unreachable. Please try again later.
importer.noDataAvailable: No game data available for import. The catalog index could not be loaded.
importer.errorLoadingSystem: Failed to load the game system: {{status}}
importer.importSuccess: The system "{{name}}" with {{amount}} catalogs was imported successfully!
importer.errorImporting: Failed to import the game data: {{message}}
importer.exportMissingXml: This game system was imported before the update and holds no original XML files in the database. Please import the game system (.zip) again to use the export.
importer.exportSuccess: Game system "{{name}}" exported successfully as .zip (original format)!
importer.errorExporting: Failed to export the game system as ZIP: {{message}}
importer.errorDeleting: Failed to delete the game system.
importer.bundleDescription: Import a complete game system, including selected factions, directly from the bundled files.
importer.welcomeText: Your tome of knowledge is still empty. To muster armies, you first need game data in the BattleScribe format.
importer.noSystems: No game systems present in the database.
importer.deleteConfirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete the game system
